text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has won the autumn Tenno Sho.
Having surpassed Oguri Cap, our next goal is the
second race of the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown—the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around the same time, word of Symboli Rudolf
joining the Japan Cup spreads. No doubt, she's
planning to engage Narita Brian head on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, Narita Brian will be able to race the
Emperor... She is so filled with determination that
she can only quietly utter "I want to win."
